faqs.question: Why are stink bugs so common in White Plains?
faqs.answer: White Plains' location in Westchester County, with its wooded areas and seasonal temperature changes, makes it ideal for stink bug populations. These pests seek shelter in homes and buildings during fall and winter, particularly in the area's many older structures with small entry points around windows, doors, and siding.

faqs.question: What does your $350-$550 stink bug treatment include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive service includes a thorough property inspection, identification of entry points, targeted exterior and interior treatment, removal of existing stink bugs, sealing of access points, and a follow-up visit. The final price depends on property size, infestation severity, and treatment complexity.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to stink bug problems in White Plains?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service for White Plains residents and businesses. Most appointments can be scheduled within 24 hours of your call, and our technicians typically complete treatment in 1-2 hours depending on property size and infestation level.

faqs.question: Are your stink bug treatments safe for families and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and eco-friendly methods that are safe for children and pets when applied by our licensed technicians. We can also provide completely green treatment options upon request, and we'll give you specific guidelines for re-entry times after treatment.
